topics_to_register.title: DAO & Decentralized Organizations
topics_to_register.description: Learning path for DAO and decentralized organizations

topics_to_register.title: Blockchain Fundamentals
topics_to_register.description: Learn the basic principles of blockchain, consensus mechanisms (PoW/PoS), smart contracts, and the difference between coins and tokens.

topics_to_register.title: Definition and Structure of DAOs
topics_to_register.description: Learn the definition of Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAOs), differences from traditional corporations, and token-based governance structures.

topics_to_register.title: TheDAO Hack and Lessons Learned
topics_to_register.description: Learn about the 2016 TheDAO hack, re-entrancy attack, and Ethereum hard fork decision.

topics_to_register.title: Convex vs Concave Decision-Making
topics_to_register.description: Learn Vitalik Buterin's Convex/Concave decision-making framework.

topics_to_register.title: DAO vs Corporation Debate
topics_to_register.description: Learn the criticism that DAOs will eventually converge to corporate structures and Vitalik's counter-argument.

topics_to_register.title: Pod Structure and Hybrid Governance
topics_to_register.description: Learn about the Pod structure combining decentralization and centralization through the Ukraine DAO case study.

topics_to_register.title: Censorship Resistance and Decentralization
topics_to_register.description: Learn the principles of how decentralization provides censorship resistance and real-world cases.

topics_to_register.title: Kleros Decentralized Court Case Study
topics_to_register.description: Learn about 'trustworthy fairness' as decentralization through the Kleros decentralized dispute resolution platform.

topics_to_register.title: Organization Man and Social Ethic
topics_to_register.description: Learn William Whyte's Organization Man concept and the background of 20th century corporate-centric society formation.

topics_to_register.title: Blockchain Man and the New Paradigm
topics_to_register.description: Learn Taylor Pearson's Blockchain Man concept and how reduced transaction costs change organization size.

topics_to_register.title: Fat Protocol Thesis
topics_to_register.description: Learn the Fat Protocol thesis that explains the difference in value distribution structure between internet and blockchain.

topics_to_register.title: 15 Application Areas of DAOs
topics_to_register.description: Learn about the various areas being transformed by DAOs.

topics_to_register.title: Why Firms Exist
topics_to_register.description: Learn Ronald Coase's transaction cost theory and the economic reasons for the existence of firms.

topics_to_register.title: Bitcoin Thriving Without a Firm
topics_to_register.description: Learn how Bitcoin achieved a sustainable digital service without a legal entity.

topics_to_register.title: Key Barriers for Decentralized Organizations
topics_to_register.description: Learn about the difficulties of decentralized decision-making, contribution measurement problems.

topics_to_register.title: Howey Test and Securities Classification
topics_to_register.description: Learn about the Howey Test, the criteria for classifying crypto tokens as securities.

topics_to_register.title: Exit to Community
topics_to_register.description: Learn about the exit-to-community strategy where teams transfer ownership to users.
